desc: ClashFinderImportResultsFromNavisworksXmlCommand — stage an NW export XML into the staging DB.
summary: ClashFinderImportResultsFromNavisworksXmlCommand — stage an NW export XML into the staging DB.
notfor: Re-running detection — this is purely ingestion.
precondition: Resolver_FilePath points to a valid NW exchange XML.
logictree:
1) Resolver_FilePath required; file must exist.
2) Read text + delegate parsing to ImportClashesFromNavisworksFile.Read.
3) For each row, build ClashRecord with id = row.Id (or SHA-256 over rule + sorted guids if blank); state already normalised by the reader.
4) ClashesRepository.Upsert; count inserts vs updates.
5) Emit imported + upserted + skipped.

preprompts: Importing NW XML into staging DB…
